evidence: "Loved this movie, I had seen it in the theatre, but wanted to see it a second time. It has heart and the acting is brillant. It is a very good thriller without the car chases and fire fights."
"Great! Should be required watching. Even if you don't have an interest in economics, it is a wonderful and scary history lesson..."
"The pacing falters and the 'revolutionary get away' story was so-so."
"Sometimes the plot was a little outlandish, but wow what a cast! I enjoyed it."
"The pacing falters and the 'revolutionary get away' story was so-so."
"It is an addicting show... I want to see how it all resolves."
"Great performances. sometimes the plot was a little outlandish, but wow what a cast! I enjoyed it."
"Interesting historical story, not such a great production."
"Gives you a glimpse into the art world outside of New York City."
"It has heart and the acting is brillant."
"Interesting psychological profile of a very strange man... worth seeing, if you have an interest in the world of art and art museums."

summary: The user enjoys thrillers and dramas, often appreciating strong performances and character depth. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for engaging stories but with some reservations about execution.
